text:
Yakovlev is an Amestrian State Military Officer from the Internal Affairs office at Central Command in Central City. 

History

Along with Storch, he approaches Riza Hawkeye with transfer orders from the top, reassigning her to the post of Führer's personal secretary.

Trivia

Like all military offices in the series, Yakovlev is named for a type of real world military vehicle, in this case the Russian military planes built by the Yakovlev aircraft company.
